name: Goma Jayu-ae (Soy & Sesame-Seed Dressing w/ F
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------DRESSING-------------------------
1 1/2 oz Ground White Sesame Seeds
1 1/2 tbsp Sugar
2 1/2 tbsp Sake
5 tbsp Soy Sauce
PREPARE IN ADVANCE:
Snip the ends of the French beans and discard. Cut the beans into 1/2 inch lengths. Place them in a bowl with 3/4 pint lightly salted boiling water. Reduce heat and cook briskly, about 8-10 minutes until the beans are tender but still slightly resistant to bite. Drain and rinse under cold water.
Put Dashi, Sugar, 1/4 tsp Salt, MSG, Sake, and Soy Sauce into a pan. Bring to a boil. Add the beans, return to boil. Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature.
DRESSING:
Heat Sake to lukewarm over high heat. Ignite Sake and allow it to burn until the flame dies out. Pour Sake into a small bowl and let cool to room temperature. Add all ingredients and mix thoroughly. TO SERVE:
Toss together the French beans and dressing, serve at room temperature.
